Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml

Class JmlIO

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlIO
public class JmlIO extends Object
Stateful service for translating JML into KeY entities.

This facade stores the parsing context of JML constructs, e.g., the return or self variable, the parameters. You can set these values via the builder methods. The translate* methods translate a given ParserRuleContext into a KeY-entity.

It also maintains the list of translation warnings, see getWarnings().

Internally, this is a type-safe wrapper around the visitor Translator.

See Also:
  • Translator

  • Constructor Details

    • JmlIO

      public JmlIO()
      Generate an empty jml i/o instance. No very useful until a services(Services) is provided.

    • JmlIO

      public JmlIO(Services services)
      Generate an empty jml i/o instance.
      Parameters:
      services - a service object used for constructing the terms

    • JmlIO

      public JmlIO(@Nonnull Services services, @Nullable KeYJavaType specInClass, @Nullable ProgramVariable selfVar, @Nullable ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars, @Nullable ProgramVariable resultVar, @Nullable ProgramVariable excVar, @Nullable Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres, @Nullable Map<LocationVariable,Term> atBefores)
      Full constructor of this class. Prefer the use via builder methods.
      Parameters:
      services - a service object used for constructing the terms
      specInClass - the class in which the expression and contracts should be evaluated
      selfVar - the self variable considered for this-references
      paramVars - a list of parameter variables
      resultVar - the \return-variable
      excVar - the variable to store exception
      atPres - i do not know
      atBefores - i do not know

  • Method Details

    • translateRepresents

      public Pair<IObserverFunction,Term> translateRepresents(ParserRuleContext clause)
      Interpret the given parse tree as a represents clause
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if unsuitable parser rule context is given

    • translateRepresents

      @Nonnull public Pair<IObserverFunction,Term> translateRepresents(@Nonnull LabeledParserRuleContext clause)
      Interpret a given represents clause.

      Note weigl: This method does not add the given term label to the returned objects. I am not if this is currently wanted/needed.

      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if unsuitable parser rule context is given@param clause

    • isKnownFunction

      public static boolean isKnownFunction(String functionName)
      Checks whether the given functionName is a known JML function for KeY.
      Parameters:
      functionName - a string
      Returns:
      true if the function is known
      See Also:
      • JmlTermFactory.jml2jdl

    • translateLabeledClause

      public Pair<Label,Term> translateLabeledClause(LabeledParserRuleContext parserRuleContext, OriginTermLabel.SpecType type)
      Interpret a labeled term (breaks clauses, continue clauses).

    • translateMergeParams

      public MergeParamsSpec translateMergeParams(JmlParser.MergeparamsspecContext ctx)
      Interpret a merge params.

    • parseExpression

      public Term parseExpression(PositionedString p)
      Parse and interpret the given string as an JML expression in the current context.

    • translateTerm

      @Nonnull public Term translateTerm(@Nonnull ParserRuleContext expr)
      Interpret the given parse tree as an JML expression in the current context.

    • translateTerm

      public Term translateTerm(LabeledParserRuleContext expr)
      Interpret the given parse tree as an JML expression in the current context. Label is attached.

    • translateTerm

      public Term translateTerm(LabeledParserRuleContext expr, OriginTermLabel.SpecType type)
      Interpret the given parse tree as an JML expression in the current context. Attach both given labels type and in labeled parse tree.

    • translateTerm

      public Term translateTerm(ParserRuleContext expr, OriginTermLabel.SpecType type)
      Interpret the given parse tree as an JML expression in the current context. Given label is attached.

    • translateTermAsFormula

      public Term translateTermAsFormula(LabeledParserRuleContext condition)
      Interpret the given parse tree as a boolean JML expression in the current context. This is for cases where translateTerm(LabeledParserRuleContext) would in some cases give a Term of sort formula and in some cases of sort boolean. Label is attached.
      Parameters:
      condition - a parse tree of a boolean JML expression
      Returns:
      a formula of the given parse tree
      See Also:
      • translateTerm(LabeledParserRuleContext)

    • parseExpression

      public Term parseExpression(String input)
      Parses and interpret the given input as an JML expression in the current context.

    • translateInfFlow

      @Nonnull public InfFlowSpec translateInfFlow(@Nonnull ParserRuleContext expr)
      Translate the given context into an information flow specification.
      Parameters:
      expr - should be a JmlParser.Separates_clauseContext or JmlParser.Determines_clauseContext, or JmlParser.Loop_separates_clauseContext or JmlParser.Loop_determines_clauseContext.
      Returns:
      a information flow specification from the given context.
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the expr is not suitable

    • translateInfFlow

      public InfFlowSpec translateInfFlow(LabeledParserRuleContext expr)
      Translate the given context into an information flow specification. Like translateInfFlow(ParserRuleContext) but this method can also handles the given label.

    • translateDependencyContract

      public Triple<IObserverFunction,Term,Term> translateDependencyContract(ParserRuleContext ctx)
      Translates the given context into a dependency contract, aka, accessible-clause or depends-clause.
      Parameters:
      ctx - should a JmlParser.Accessible_clauseContext
      Returns:
      a dependency contract
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the ctx is not suitable

    • translateDependencyContract

      public Triple<IObserverFunction,Term,Term> translateDependencyContract(LabeledParserRuleContext ctx)
      Translates a dependency contract.

      Note (weigl): No label is currently attached.

      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the ctx is not suitable
